use_cases: Indicating loading states during data fetching in web applications
Showing progress feedback during async operations like form submissions
Adding visual interest to page transitions or route changes
Displaying loading status for content-heavy pages in dashboards
Enhancing user experience during background processing tasks
ai_summary: A visually engaging SVG-based loader component featuring two worm-like elements animating along curved sinusoidal paths. The component uses two vibrant multi-stop linear gradients (rainbow spectrum) that create a playful, eye-catching loading indicator. Built with React and styled with Tailwind CSS, it includes predefined linear gradients for both directions and requires corresponding CSS keyframe animations (animate-worm1, animate-worm2) to function properly. The SVG scales responsively and works across desktop and mobile platforms.
